If at start of phase:
  -> Roll 8D6 (max 2 activations):
    - Unbridled Bloodlust: need pair of 1+ -> +1 to charge rolls for all friendly
    - Rage-Fuelled Invigoration: need pair of 2+ -> all friendly gains pile in consolidation 6"
    - Total Carnage: need pair of 3+ -> if destroyed by a melee attack and not has fought this phase: roll D6: on 4+, self fights on death
    - Martial Excellence: need pair of 4+ -> all friendly's melee weapons gain Sustained Hits 1
    - Warp Blades: need pair of 5+ -> all friendly's melee weapons gain Lethal Hits
    - Decapitating Strikes: need triple of 6+ -> if the target has "Infantry" and for melee attacks: all friendly's weapons gain Devastating Wounds
Scope: any on battlefield. Duration: battle round.

  -> unit fights first
Scope: unit. Duration: phase.
